title: RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
description: Master Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to define granular permissions within a Kubernetes cluster. Architect RBAC using Roles, ClusterRoles, and ServiceAccounts to mitigate the risk of lateral movement after a pod compromise.
objectives: Master Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to define granular permissions within a Kubernetes cluster.
Architect RBAC using Roles, ClusterRoles, and ServiceAccounts to mitigate the risk of lateral movement after a pod compromise.
